QF.id: XXVA Introduction to Research Analyst Framework_11

question.text: SEBI was established under which act and in which year?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** SEBI was established under Section 3 of the SEBI Act, 1992 to protect investor interests, promote development of, and regulate the securities market. **The Trap:** SCRA 1956 predates SEBI and deals with securities contracts. Companies Act deals with corporate governance. RBI Act established the central bank, not the securities regulator. **Cross-Exam Context:** This is a foundational question tested across virtually all NISM exams — Series XII, V-A, VII, III-A, and others. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** SEBI's three-fold mandate (protect investors, develop markets, regulate markets) should guide all your compliance thinking — every SEBI regulation serves one or more of these objectives.
